title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: A 10-minute video tutorial on AWS Identity and Access Management fundamentals, covering the bouncer analogy, users vs. roles vs. policies, least privilege principle, IAM Access Analyzer, and security best practices like avoiding access keys in code.
